description: Product Description Welcome to RVROVIC Footwear Store! RVROVIC Company are dedicated in Providing Baby and Kids Booties, Moccasins, Sneakers, Loafers, Boots, Sandals, Flats, more than 8 Years. We are confident that this Baby Soft Sneakers will make Moms, Dads and Children Smile. Made for parents,Love for babies. Item Type: Baby Soft and fashionable PU Leather Loafer Flats Material: PU Leather Style:Lacing,Hook&Loop Shoes,Oxford Loafer Color: White,Black,Khaki,Dark Blue,Beige,Leopard,Brown,Pink,Grey,Red,Yellow Season: Spring,Summer,Autumn,Winter Gender: Infant toddler baby boys girls Package includes:1 pair of shoes. Premium Material Our baby sneakers are made of high quality PU leather,which is very good for baby' feet growth.No any stimulation to the skin of baby. Anti Skid Dot The bottom of our loafer flats with rubber sole is for anti-skid ,Which is good for baby's feet to learning walking. Classic design Classic Simple design. Lace-up,Hook&Loop Closure makes it easiser to put on and take off,and stay on your baby's feet. Perfect Gift Multi colors and styles can match different occasions. Such as Crawling, Walking,Playing, Wedding or Photography. It will be a Great Baby Baptism Shower, First Birthday Gift,Christmas. Size chart Note: Due to it's manual measured, 0.5-1cm error is allowed. Thanks for your understanding. Note: The recommended age is just for your reference,Please measure your baby's feet length to choose the right size for your baby. Size Reference: 1inch=2.54cm Size-------Sole Length---------Sole Width ---------Recommended Age S---------11cm/4.33" ---------5.1cm/2.00" ---------0-6 months M---------12cm/4.72" ---------5.5cm/2.16"---------6-12 months L---------13cm/5.11" ---------5.8cm/2.28"---------12-18 months
